title: Max Difference You Can Get From Changing an Integer
hints: To maximize the difference, you must independently maximize the first number and minimize the second number.
To maximize, replace the first non-nine digit with nine. To minimize, find the first digit that can safely become zero or one.
Be careful with leading zeros when minimizing: if the first digit is not one, replace it with one; otherwise, replace the first non-zero, non-one digit with zero.
